# Fixture Constitution

A minimal constitution carrying the three anchors that the canonical
`framework/commands/implement.md` references under `Reference:`. The
runtime's `constitution-excerpts` builder reads this file and pulls
the section body between each `<!-- §anchor -->` marker and the next
marker (or EOF).

<!-- §implement-phase -->

## Implement Phase

Write code and tests for one task per invocation.

<!-- §pipeline-boundaries -->

## Pipeline Boundaries

Status transitions require user approval.

<!-- §text-first-artifacts -->

## Text-First Artifacts

Specs, plans, and tasks are markdown.
